newsArray.title: DC vs RCB: Why Mitchell Starc is Not Playing Tonight’s IPL 2026 Match in Delhi — Full Reason Explained
newsArray.description: DC vs RCB IPL 2026: Despite joining the Delhi Capitals squad last week, Mitchell Starc did not find a place in DC's playing XI for the IPL 2026 clash at Arun Jaitley Stadium. A Cricket Australia medical report has ruled him unavailable until May 1, forcing Axar Patel’s side to reshuffle their bowling attack against the Royal Challengers Bengaluru. newsArray.title: KL Rahul Aims for Continued Success Against RCB After Record-Breaking Performance
newsArray.description: KL Rahul is on a remarkable streak following his record-breaking 152* against Punjab Kings. As he prepares to face Royal Challengers Bengaluru, his impressive stats and historical performance against RCB highlight his potential impact. With aspirations for the upcoming T20 World Cup, Rahul's current form makes him a key player to watch. The article also includes the complete team lineups for both Delhi Capitals and RCB, setting the stage for an exciting match.
